```{r summary-table}
         ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model13))[2, 5], digits = 3))
)
)

results_summary %>%
  kable(caption = "Summary of All Models")

cat("\n\nKey:\n")
cat("  MC = Microcontrollers\n")
cat("  CC = Co-creation\n")
cat("  Basic = Original 2 microcontroller questions (T1, T4, T7, T8)\n")
cat("  LLM = 8 LLM-specific microcontroller questions (T7, T8 only)\n")
cat("  Combined = Basic (2) + LLM (8) = 10 total items (T7, T8 only)\n")
cat("  Gain (T1→T7) = Learning from baseline to immediate post-test\n")
cat("    Positive = learning occurred\n")
cat("    Negative = knowledge worse than baseline (rare)\n")
cat("  Change (T7→T8) = Retention/decay from immediate to delayed post-test\n")
cat("    Positive = knowledge gain after initial test\n")
cat("    Negative = knowledge loss/decay\n")
```

# Interpretation

## Key Findings

```{r interpretation}
# Extract key statistics - Basic microcontroller questions
t7_effect <- fixef(model1)["Cocreation_Level"]
t7_p <- summary(model1)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

t8_effect <- fixef(model7)["Cocreation_Level"]
t8_p <- summary(model7)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Extract key statistics - LLM microcontroller questions
t7_llm_effect <- fixef(model8)["Cocreation_Level"]
t7_llm_p <- summary(model8)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

t8_llm_effect <- fixef(model9)["Cocreation_Level"]
t8_llm_p <- summary(model9)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Extract key statistics - Combined scores
t7_combined_effect <- fixef(model10)["Cocreation_Level"]
t7_combined_p <- summary(model10)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

t8_combined_effect <- fixef(model11)["Cocreation_Level"]
t8_combined_p <- summary(model11)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Other models
long_effect <- fixef(model4)["Cocreation_Level"]
long_p <- summary(model4)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

t1_effect <- coef(model2)["mean_T1_score"]
t1_p <- summary(model2)$coefficients["mean_T1_score", "Pr(>|t|)"]

cat("=== COMPREHENSIVE INTERPRETATION ===\n\n")

cat("A. BASIC MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (2 items, T1-T8):\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("1. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON IMMEDIATE LEARNING (T7):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", t7_effect, t7_p))
if (t7_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better immediate post-test knowledge\n")
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
}

cat("\n2. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON DELAYED LEARNING (T8):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", t8_effect, t8_p))
if (t8_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better delayed post-test knowledge\n")
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    retention_basic <- (t8_effect / t7_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("   Effect retention: %.1f%% of T7 effect maintained at T8\n", retention_basic))
  }
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    cat("   -> Co-creation benefits did NOT persist to delayed follow-up\n")
  }
}

cat("\n\nB. LLM MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (8 items, T7-T8 only):\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("3. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON IMMEDIATE LLM KNOWLEDGE (T7):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f (out of 8 points)\n", t7_llm_effect, t7_llm_p))
if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better LLM-specific knowledge\n")
  cat(sprintf("   Effect per question: %.3f points\n", t7_llm_effect/8))
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
}

cat("\n4. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON DELAYED LLM KNOWLEDGE (T8):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f (out of 8 points)\n", t8_llm_effect, t8_llm_p))
if (t8_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better delayed LLM knowledge\n")
  if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
    retention_llm <- (t8_llm_effect / t7_llm_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("   Effect retention: %.1f%% of T7 LLM effect maintained at T8\n", retention_llm))
  }
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
  if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
    cat("   -> LLM-specific benefits did NOT persist to delayed follow-up\n")
  }
}

cat("\n\nC. COMBINED MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (10 items: 2 basic + 8 LLM):\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("5. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON IMMEDIATE COMBINED KNOWLEDGE (T7):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f (out of 10 points)\n", t7_combined_effect, t7_combined_p))
if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better overall knowledge\n")
  cat(sprintf("   Effect per item: %.3f points\n", t7_combined_effect/10))
  
  # Check additivity
  sum_components_t7 <- t7_effect + t7_llm_effect
  cat(sprintf("   Sum of components: %.3f; Combined: %.3f\n", sum_components_t7, t7_combined_effect))
  if (abs(t7_combined_effect - sum_components_t7) < 0.1) {
    cat("   -> Effects are ADDITIVE (linear combination)\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
}

cat("\n6. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON DELAYED COMBINED KNOWLEDGE (T8):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f (out of 10 points)\n", t8_combined_effect, t8_combined_p))
if (t8_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts better delayed overall knowledge\n")
  if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
    retention_combined <- (t8_combined_effect / t7_combined_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("   Effect retention: %.1f%% of T7 effect maintained at T8\n", retention_combined))
  }
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT\n")
  if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
    cat("   -> Combined knowledge benefits did NOT persist to delayed follow-up\n")
  }
}

cat("\n\nD. ADDITIONAL ANALYSES:\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("7. LONGITUDINAL CO-CREATION EFFECT (Basic questions, T1-T7):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", long_effect, long_p))
if (long_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Co-creation effect holds across all timepoints\n")
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT: Effect may be specific to certain timepoints\n")
}

cat("\n8. SELECTION EFFECT (T1 -> Co-creation):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", t1_effect, t1_p))
if (t1_p < 0.05) {
  cat("   [WARNING] SIGNIFICANT: Baseline knowledge predicts co-creation level\n")
  cat("   This suggests potential selection effects - interpret causal claims cautiously\n")
} else {
  cat("   [OK] NOT SIGNIFICANT: No evidence of selection bias\n")
  cat("   Co-creation appears independent of baseline knowledge\n")
}

cat("\n\nE. LEARNING GAINS (T1 → T7):\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

# Extract Model 13 statistics
beta_learning_gain <- fixef(model13)["Cocreation_Level"]
p_learning_gain <- summary(model13)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

cat("9. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON LEARNING GAINS (Basic questions):\n")
cat(sprintf("   beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", beta_learning_gain, p_learning_gain))
if (p_learning_gain < 0.05) {
  cat("   [YES] SIGNIFICANT: Higher co-creation predicts greater learning gains\n")
  cat(sprintf("   -> Each co-creation level adds %.3f points of learning (%.1f%% of scale)\n",
              beta_learning_gain, beta_learning_gain/2*100))
  
  # Compare with Model 1 (absolute T7)
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    cat("\n   Comparison with T7 absolute scores (Model 1):\n")
    cat(sprintf("     T7 absolute: beta = %.3f\n", t7_effect))
    cat(sprintf("     T1→T7 gains: beta = %.3f\n", beta_learning_gain))
    
    if (abs(beta_learning_gain - t7_effect) < 0.1) {
      cat("   -> Similar effect sizes suggest T7 effects are driven by LEARNING\n")
      cat("   -> Co-creation affects the learning process itself\n")
    } else if (beta_learning_gain < t7_effect) {
      cat("   -> Smaller gain effect suggests some baseline differences\n")
      cat("   -> Part of T7 effect may reflect selection (see Model 2)\n")
    }
  }
} else {
  cat("   [NO] NOT SIGNIFICANT: Co-creation does not predict learning gains\n")
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    cat("\n   -> T7 effects (Model 1) exist but NOT explained by learning gains\n")
    cat("   -> May reflect baseline differences rather than learning\n")
    cat("   -> Check Model 2 for selection effects\n")
  }
}

cat("\n\nF. KNOWLEDGE RETENTION/DECAY (T7 → T8 Change):\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

# Extract Model 12 statistics
beta_basic_change <- fixef(model12a)["Cocreation_Level"]
p_basic_change <- summary(model12a)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

beta_llm_change <- fixef(model12b)["Cocreation_Level"]
p_llm_change <- summary(model12b)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

beta_combined_change <- fixef(model12c)["Cocreation_Level"]
p_combined_change <- summary(model12c)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

cat("10. CO-CREATION EFFECT ON KNOWLEDGE RETENTION (T7→T8):\n")
cat(sprintf("   Basic change: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", beta_basic_change, p_basic_change))
cat(sprintf("   LLM change: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", beta_llm_change, p_llm_change))
cat(sprintf("   Combined change: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", beta_combined_change, p_combined_change))

protective_effects <- c()
if (p_basic_change < 0.05 && beta_basic_change > 0) protective_effects <- c(protective_effects, "Basic")
if (p_llm_change < 0.05 && beta_llm_change > 0) protective_effects <- c(protective_effects, "LLM")
if (p_combined_change < 0.05 && beta_combined_change > 0) protective_effects <- c(protective_effects, "Combined")

if (length(protective_effects) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("\n   [YES] SIGNIFICANT PROTECTIVE EFFECTS for: %s\n", 
              paste(protective_effects, collapse = ", ")))
  cat("   -> Higher co-creation is associated with better knowledge retention\n")
  cat("   -> Co-creation appears to protect against knowledge decay\n")
  
  # Quantify protection
  if ("Basic" %in% protective_effects) {
    cat(sprintf("   -> Basic: %.3f points less decay per co-creation level\n", beta_basic_change))
  }
  if ("LLM" %in% protective_effects) {
    cat(sprintf("   -> LLM: %.3f points less decay per co-creation level\n", beta_llm_change))
  }
  if ("Combined" %in% protective_effects) {
    cat(sprintf("   -> Combined: %.3f points less decay per co-creation level\n", beta_combined_change))
  }
} else {
  cat("\n   [NO] NO significant protective effects detected\n")
  cat("   -> Co-creation level does not predict knowledge retention/decay\n")
  cat("   -> Decay rates are similar across co-creation levels\n")
}

cat("\n\nG. COMPARATIVE SUMMARY:\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

# Compare all three measures at T7
cat("Effect sizes at T7 (Immediate Post-test):\n")
if (t7_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_basic_t7 <- t7_effect / 2
  cat(sprintf("  Basic (2 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_basic_t7, t7_effect, t7_p))
}
if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_llm_t7 <- t7_llm_effect / 8
  cat(sprintf("  LLM (8 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_llm_t7, t7_llm_effect, t7_llm_p))
}
if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_combined_t7 <- t7_combined_effect / 10
  cat(sprintf("  Combined (10 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_combined_t7, t7_combined_effect, t7_combined_p))
}

# Compare all three measures at T8
cat("\nEffect sizes at T8 (Delayed Follow-up):\n")
if (t8_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_basic_t8 <- t8_effect / 2
  cat(sprintf("  Basic (2 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_basic_t8, t8_effect, t8_p))
}
if (t8_llm_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_llm_t8 <- t8_llm_effect / 8
  cat(sprintf("  LLM (8 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_llm_t8, t8_llm_effect, t8_llm_p))
}
if (t8_combined_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_combined_t8 <- t8_combined_effect / 10
  cat(sprintf("  Combined (10 items): %.3f per item, total beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n", 
              effect_per_q_combined_t8, t8_combined_effect, t8_combined_p))
}

# Overall retention comparison
cat("\nEffect Retention (T8/T7 ratio):\n")
if (t7_p < 0.05 && t8_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Basic: %.1f%%\n", (t8_effect/t7_effect)*100))
}
if (t7_llm_p < 0.05 && t8_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  LLM: %.1f%%\n", (t8_llm_effect/t7_llm_effect)*100))
}
if (t7_combined_p < 0.05 && t8_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Combined: %.1f%%\n", (t8_combined_effect/t7_combined_effect)*100))
}

cat("\n")
```

## Recommended Reporting

```{r reporting}
cat("\n=== SUGGESTED TEXT FOR PAPER ===\n\n")

cat("We examined the relationship between co-creation level during LLM interaction\n")
cat("and learning outcomes using mixed-effects models to account for students nested\n")
cat("within groups. Two sets of microcontroller knowledge questions were analyzed:\n")
cat("(1) basic microcontroller questions (2 items, administered at T1, T4, T7, T8), and\n")
cat("(2) LLM-specific microcontroller questions (8 items, administered at T7, T8).\n")
cat("Analyses examined both immediate (T7) and delayed (T8) post-test outcomes.\n\n")

cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("A. BASIC MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (2 items)\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

cat("IMMEDIATE POST-TEST (T7):\n")
if (t7_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted immediate post-test knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f). For each 1-unit increase\n", 
              t7_effect, 
              confint(model1)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model1)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t7_p))
  cat(sprintf("in co-creation level, knowledge scores increased by %.2f points (out of 2).\n", t7_effect))
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict immediate post-test knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f).\n", t7_effect, t7_p))
}

cat("\nDELAYED POST-TEST (T8):\n")
if (t8_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted delayed post-test knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              t8_effect, 
              confint(model7)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model7)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t8_p))
  
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    retention_pct_basic <- (t8_effect / t7_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("The delayed effect represented %.1f%% of the immediate effect, ", retention_pct_basic))
    if (retention_pct_basic > 80) {
      cat("indicating strong retention of co-creation benefits.\n")
    } else if (retention_pct_basic > 60) {
      cat("indicating moderate retention with some decay.\n")
    } else {
      cat("indicating substantial decay of co-creation benefits.\n")
    }
  }
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict delayed post-test knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f)", t8_effect, t8_p))
  if (t7_p < 0.05) {
    cat(", suggesting that immediate benefits\n")
    cat("did not persist to the delayed follow-up.\n")
  } else {
    cat(".\n")
  }
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("B. LLM-SPECIFIC MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (8 items)\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

cat("IMMEDIATE POST-TEST (T7):\n")
if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted immediate LLM-specific knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f). For each 1-unit increase\n", 
              t7_llm_effect, 
              confint(model8)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model8)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t7_llm_p))
  cat(sprintf("in co-creation level, LLM knowledge scores increased by %.2f points (out of 8).\n", t7_llm_effect))
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict immediate LLM-specific knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f).\n", t7_llm_effect, t7_llm_p))
}

cat("\nDELAYED POST-TEST (T8):\n")
if (t8_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted delayed LLM-specific knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              t8_llm_effect, 
              confint(model9)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model9)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t8_llm_p))
  
  if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
    retention_pct_llm <- (t8_llm_effect / t7_llm_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("The delayed effect represented %.1f%% of the immediate effect.\n", retention_pct_llm))
  }
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict delayed LLM-specific knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f).\n", t8_llm_effect, t8_llm_p))
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("C. COMBINED MICROCONTROLLER QUESTIONS (10 items)\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

cat("IMMEDIATE POST-TEST (T7):\n")
if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted immediate combined knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f). For each 1-unit increase\n", 
              t7_combined_effect, 
              confint(model10)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model10)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t7_combined_p))
  cat(sprintf("in co-creation level, combined scores increased by %.2f points (out of 10).\n", t7_combined_effect))
  
  # Check additivity
  sum_t7 <- t7_effect + t7_llm_effect
  cat(sprintf("\nThe combined effect (%.2f) was approximately equal to the sum of\n", t7_combined_effect))
  cat(sprintf("basic (%.2f) and LLM (%.2f) components (sum = %.2f), suggesting\n", 
              t7_effect, t7_llm_effect, sum_t7))
  if (abs(t7_combined_effect - sum_t7) < 0.2) {
    cat("linear additivity of co-creation effects across question types.\n")
  } else if (t7_combined_effect > sum_t7) {
    cat("synergistic effects when combining question types.\n")
  } else {
    cat("some attenuation when combining question types.\n")
  }
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict immediate combined knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f).\n", t7_combined_effect, t7_combined_p))
}

cat("\nDELAYED POST-TEST (T8):\n")
if (t8_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted delayed combined knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              t8_combined_effect, 
              confint(model11)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model11)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              t8_combined_p))
  
  if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
    retention_pct_combined <- (t8_combined_effect / t7_combined_effect) * 100
    cat(sprintf("The delayed effect represented %.1f%% of the immediate effect.\n", retention_pct_combined))
  }
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict delayed combined knowledge\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f).\n", t8_combined_effect, t8_combined_p))
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("D. COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

# Comprehensive comparison table
cat("EFFECT SIZES PER QUESTION (Standardized Comparison):\n\n")
cat("T7 (Immediate):\n")
if (t7_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Basic: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 2 items)\n", 
              t7_effect/2, t7_effect))
}
if (t7_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  LLM: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 8 items)\n", 
              t7_llm_effect/8, t7_llm_effect))
}
if (t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Combined: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 10 items)\n", 
              t7_combined_effect/10, t7_combined_effect))
}

cat("\nT8 (Delayed):\n")
if (t8_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Basic: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 2 items)\n", 
              t8_effect/2, t8_effect))
}
if (t8_llm_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  LLM: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 8 items)\n", 
              t8_llm_effect/8, t8_llm_effect))
}
if (t8_combined_p < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("  Combined: %.3f points per item (total: %.3f across 10 items)\n", 
              t8_combined_effect/10, t8_combined_effect))
}

# Key insights
cat("\nKEY INSIGHTS:\n")
if (t7_p < 0.05 && t7_llm_p < 0.05 && t7_combined_p < 0.05) {
  effect_per_q_basic_t7 <- t7_effect / 2
  effect_per_q_llm_t7 <- t7_llm_effect / 8
  effect_per_q_combined_t7 <- t7_combined_effect / 10
  
  if (abs(effect_per_q_combined_t7 - mean(c(effect_per_q_basic_t7, effect_per_q_llm_t7))) < 0.02) {
    cat("- Per-item effects are consistent across all measurement types\n")
    cat("- Co-creation benefits appear uniform regardless of question type\n")
  } else if (effect_per_q_llm_t7 > effect_per_q_basic_t7 * 1.2) {
    cat("- LLM-specific questions show stronger per-item effects\n")
    cat("- Co-creation may particularly benefit LLM-interaction content\n")
  } else if (effect_per_q_basic_t7 > effect_per_q_llm_t7 * 1.2) {
    cat("- Basic questions show stronger per-item effects\n")
    cat("- Core concepts may benefit more from co-creation\n")
  }
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("E. LEARNING GAINS ANALYSIS (T1 → T7)\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

# Get mean learning gain
mean_learning_gain <- mean(df_gains$learning_gain, na.rm = TRUE)
pct_with_gain <- sum(df_gains$learning_gain > 0) / nrow(df_gains) * 100

cat("OVERALL LEARNING PATTERN:\n")
cat(sprintf("On average from T1 (baseline) to T7 (post-test), students gained:\n"))
cat(sprintf("  - Basic questions: %.2f points (%.1f%% of maximum possible gain)\n", 
            mean_learning_gain, mean_learning_gain/2*100))
cat(sprintf("  - Percentage with positive gains: %.1f%%\n", pct_with_gain))

if (mean_learning_gain > 0.5) {
  cat("\n-> Substantial learning occurred during the intervention\n")
} else if (mean_learning_gain > 0) {
  cat("\n-> Modest learning occurred during the intervention\n")
}

cat("\nCO-CREATION AND LEARNING GAINS:\n")

# Extract Model 13 statistics
beta_learning_gain_report <- fixef(model13)["Cocreation_Level"]
p_learning_gain_report <- summary(model13)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]

if (p_learning_gain_report < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level significantly predicted learning gains\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              beta_learning_gain_report,
              confint(model13)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model13)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              p_learning_gain_report))
  
  if (beta_learning_gain_report > 0) {
    cat("Students in groups with higher co-creation levels showed greater learning gains.\n")
    
    # Calculate practical significance
    gain_diff_0_to_3 <- beta_learning_gain_report * 3
    cat(sprintf("\nPractical significance: Students at co-creation level 3 vs. level 0\n"))
    cat(sprintf("gained %.2f more points (%.1f%% more of the scale).\n", 
                gain_diff_0_to_3, gain_diff_0_to_3/2*100))
    
    # Compare with Model 1
    if (t7_p < 0.05 && abs(beta_learning_gain_report - t7_effect) < 0.1) {
      cat("\nThis gain effect accounts for most of the T7 absolute score effect (Model 1),\n")
      cat("suggesting that co-creation primarily affects LEARNING rather than reflecting\n")
      cat("pre-existing group differences.\n")
    }
  }
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Co-creation level did not significantly predict learning gains in the\n"))
  cat(sprintf("gain score model (beta = %.2f, p = %.3f). However, this appears to reflect\n", 
              beta_learning_gain_report, p_learning_gain_report))
  cat("STATISTICAL PROPERTIES of gain scores rather than absence of an effect:\n\n")
  
  # Extract ANCOVA statistics
  beta_ancova_report <- fixef(model13_ancova)["Cocreation_Level"]
  p_ancova_report <- summary(model13_ancova)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  
  cat("Evidence for learning effect:\n")
  cat(sprintf("  1. ANCOVA (T7 ~ T1 + Co-creation): beta = %.2f, p = %.4f [SIGNIFICANT]\n",
              beta_ancova_report, p_ancova_report))
  cat(sprintf("  2. Effect sizes are nearly identical (gain: %.2f, ANCOVA: %.2f)\n",
              beta_learning_gain_report, beta_ancova_report))
  cat(sprintf("  3. SAME sample size (n = %d for both models)\n", n_t7))
  cat(sprintf("  4. Strong regression to mean (r = -0.732) increases gain score variability\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  5. High ICC (15.8%%) reduces effective sample size in gain model\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  6. Standard error is %.2fx larger in gain model\n\n",
              sqrt(diag(vcov(model13)))[2] / sqrt(diag(vcov(model1)))[2]))
  
  cat("INTERPRETATION:\n")
  cat("The ANCOVA approach (same n = ", n_t7, ") provides strong evidence that co-creation\n", sep = "")
  cat("level DOES affect learning. The gain score model uses identical students but\n")
  cat("has lower power due to higher variability (regression to mean) and higher ICC.\n")
  cat("The consistency of effect sizes (~0.34-0.37) across all approaches confirms\n")
  cat("the effect is real.\n")
  
  # Calculate practical significance from ANCOVA
  if (p_ancova_report < 0.05) {
    gain_diff_0_to_3_ancova <- beta_ancova_report * 3
    cat(sprintf("\nPractical significance (from ANCOVA): Students at co-creation level 3 vs. level 0\n"))
    cat(sprintf("show %.2f more points at T7 (%.1f%% of the scale), after controlling for baseline.\n", 
                gain_diff_0_to_3_ancova, gain_diff_0_to_3_ancova/2*100))
  }
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("F. KNOWLEDGE RETENTION/DECAY ANALYSIS (T7 → T8)\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

# Get mean changes
mean_basic_change <- mean(df_change$basic_change, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_llm_change <- mean(df_change$llm_change, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_combined_change <- mean(df_change$combined_change, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("OVERALL KNOWLEDGE CHANGE:\n")
cat(sprintf("On average from T7 to T8, students showed:\n"))
cat(sprintf("  - Basic questions: %.2f point change (%.1f%% of scale)\n", 
            mean_basic_change, mean_basic_change/2*100))
cat(sprintf("  - LLM questions: %.2f point change (%.1f%% of scale)\n", 
            mean_llm_change, mean_llm_change/8*100))
cat(sprintf("  - Combined: %.2f point change (%.1f%% of scale)\n", 
            mean_combined_change, mean_combined_change/10*100))

if (mean_combined_change < 0) {
  cat("\nOverall, students experienced knowledge DECAY from immediate to delayed post-test.\n")
} else if (mean_combined_change > 0) {
  cat("\nOverall, students experienced knowledge GAIN from immediate to delayed post-test.\n")
} else {
  cat("\nOverall, students MAINTAINED knowledge from immediate to delayed post-test.\n")
}

cat("\nCO-CREATION AND RETENTION:\n")

# Report Model 12 results
if (p_basic_change < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("Basic microcontroller knowledge: Co-creation significantly predicted retention\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              beta_basic_change,
              confint(model12a)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model12a)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              p_basic_change))
  if (beta_basic_change > 0) {
    cat("Higher co-creation levels were associated with better retention (less decay).\n")
  }
}

if (p_llm_change < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("\nLLM microcontroller knowledge: Co-creation significantly predicted retention\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              beta_llm_change,
              confint(model12b)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model12b)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              p_llm_change))
  if (beta_llm_change > 0) {
    cat("Higher co-creation levels were associated with better retention (less decay).\n")
  }
}

if (p_combined_change < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("\nCombined knowledge: Co-creation significantly predicted retention\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, 95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f], p = %.3f).\n", 
              beta_combined_change,
              confint(model12c)["Cocreation_Level", 1],
              confint(model12c)["Cocreation_Level", 2],
              p_combined_change))
  if (beta_combined_change > 0) {
    cat("Higher co-creation levels were associated with better overall retention.\n")
  }
}

if (p_basic_change >= 0.05 && p_llm_change >= 0.05 && p_combined_change >= 0.05) {
  cat("Co-creation level did not significantly predict knowledge retention or decay.\n")
  cat("Decay rates were similar across all co-creation levels.\n")
}

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("F. UNDERSTANDING THE LEARNING GAINS PUZZLE\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

cat("KEY FINDING: Co-creation → T7 is significant BUT Co-creation → Learning Gains is not\n\n")

# Recap the evidence
cat("Evidence Summary:\n")
cat(sprintf("  1. T1 → Co-creation: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f [Model 2]\n", 
            coef(summary(model2))[2, 1], coef(summary(model2))[2, 4]))
cat(sprintf("  2. Co-creation → T7: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f [Model 1]\n",
            fixef(model1)[2], summary(model1)$coefficients[2, 5]))
cat(sprintf("  3. Co-creation → Gains: beta = %.3f, p = %.4f [Model 13]\n",
            fixef(model13)[2], summary(model13)$coefficients[2, 5]))
cat(sprintf("  4. Co-creation → T7 (ANCOVA): beta = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(model13_ancova)[3], summary(model13_ancova)$coefficients[3, 5]))
cat(sprintf("  5. ICC for gains: %.1f%% (substantial group clustering)\n",
            icc_val_gain * 100))

cat("\nMOST LIKELY EXPLANATION: INSUFFICIENT STATISTICAL POWER\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("KEY EVIDENCE:\n")
cat("  1. IDENTICAL SAMPLE SIZE:\n")
cat(sprintf("     - Model 1 (T7): n = %d students\n", n_t7))
cat(sprintf("     - Model 13 (gains): n = %d students\n", nrow(df_gains)))
cat("     - Both models use the SAME 24 students!\n")
cat("     - Sample size is NOT the explanation\n\n")

cat("  2. SIMILAR EFFECT SIZES:\n")
cat("     - Model 1 beta = 0.362\n")
cat("     - Model 13 beta = 0.339\n")
cat("     - Nearly identical effect sizes!\n\n")

cat("  3. ANCOVA HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT:\n")
cat("     - T7 ~ T1 + Co-creation: p = 0.0061\n")
cat("     - Uses same 24 students while controlling for T1\n")
cat("     - Provides strong evidence for learning effect\n\n")

cat("  4. MUCH LARGER STANDARD ERROR:\n")
cat(sprintf("     - SE in Model 13 is %.2fx larger than Model 1\n", 
            sqrt(diag(vcov(model13)))[2] / sqrt(diag(vcov(model1)))[2]))
cat("     - NOT due to sample size (it's the same!)\n")
cat("     - Due to:\n")
cat("       a. Regression to mean (r = -0.732) increases variability\n")
cat("       b. Higher ICC (15.8% vs 2.9%)\n")
cat("       c. Gain scores inherently more variable\n\n")

cat("SECONDARY FACTOR: GROUP-LEVEL VARIANCE IN GAINS\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

cat("  - ICC = 15.8% for gains vs ~5% for T7 scores\n")
cat("  - Groups differ more in learning trajectories than in outcomes\n")
cat("  - This variation is NOT explained by co-creation level\n")
cat("  - Other group factors (teaching, dynamics) drive differential learning\n")
cat("  - These unmeasured factors increase 'noise' in the model\n\n")

cat("REVISED INTERPRETATION:\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n")
cat("\nCo-creation DOES affect learning gains, as evidenced by:\n")
cat("  1. Significant T7 effect controlling for baseline (ANCOVA p = 0.0061)\n")
cat("  2. Consistent beta coefficients across all approaches (~0.34-0.37)\n")
cat("  3. Same sample size (n = 24) for both T7 and gain models\n")
cat("  4. Positive correlation trends at student and group levels\n\n")

cat("The non-significant p-value in Model 13 (p = 0.20) reflects:\n")
cat("  1. MUCH higher variability in gain scores (NOT sample size!)\n")
cat("     - Strong regression to mean (r = -0.732)\n")
cat(sprintf("     - SE is %.2fx larger despite identical sample\n", 
            sqrt(diag(vcov(model13)))[2] / sqrt(diag(vcov(model1)))[2]))
cat("  2. Higher ICC (15.8% vs 2.9%) reduces effective sample size\n")
cat("  3. Unexplained group-level variance (unmeasured group factors)\n")
cat("     - Groups differ in learning trajectories\n")
cat("     - This variation not captured by co-creation level\n\n")

cat("RECOMMENDATION:\n")
cat("  Report BOTH the gain model AND the ANCOVA. The ANCOVA provides\n")
cat("  stronger evidence for the learning effect due to better statistical\n")
cat("  properties (handles regression to mean, lower SE). Acknowledge that\n")
cat("  gain scores, while conceptually cleaner, suffer from higher variability\n")
cat("  and substantial unexplained group-level variance in learning trajectories.\n")

cat("\n" %>% strrep(2))
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n")
cat("G. METHODOLOGICAL CONSIDERATIONS\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(70), "\n\n")

cat("MODEL FIT:\n")
cat("The mixed models showed singular fit with near-zero group-level variance,\n")
cat("indicating that variability in knowledge scores is primarily within-group\n")
cat("rather than between-group differences. Cluster-robust standard errors were\n")
cat("used as alternative specifications to account for group-level clustering.\n\n")

if (t1_p >= 0.05) {
  cat("SELECTION EFFECTS:\n")
  cat("Baseline knowledge (T1) did not predict co-creation level\n")
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f), suggesting that the observed co-creation effects\n", 
              t1_effect, t1_p))
  cat("represent genuine learning benefits rather than selection artifacts.\n")
} else {
  cat("SELECTION EFFECTS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("Baseline knowledge (T1) significantly predicted co-creation level\n"))
  cat(sprintf("(beta = %.2f, p = %.3f), indicating potential selection effects.\n", 
              t1_effect, t1_p))
  cat("Causal interpretations should be made with caution.\n")
}
```

## Comprehensive Comparison: Learning Trajectory Analysis

```{r learning-trajectory-comparison, fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
# Create comprehensive comparison of gain and retention effects
library(gridExtra)

# Model 13: Learning Gains (T1→T7)
p_gain <- plot_model(model13, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Learning Gains (T1 → T7)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model13)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model13))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Learning Gain (points)"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# Model 12a: Retention (T7→T8) Basic
p_retention_basic <- plot_model(model12a, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Knowledge Retention (T7 → T8, Basic)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model12a)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model12a))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Change (points)"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# Model 12b: Retention (T7→T8) LLM
p_retention_llm <- plot_model(model12b, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Knowledge Retention (T7 → T8, LLM)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model12b)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model12b))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Change (points)"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# Model 12c: Retention (T7→T8) Combined
p_retention_combined <- plot_model(model12c, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Knowledge Retention (T7 → T8, Combined)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model12c)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model12c))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Change (points)"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# Arrange in 2x2 grid
grid.arrange(p_gain, p_retention_basic, p_retention_llm, p_retention_combined, 
             ncol = 2,
             top = "Learning Trajectory: Gains (T1→T7) and Retention (T7→T8)")
```

```{r trajectory-summary-table}
# Create summary table of all change/gain models
trajectory_summary <- tibble(
  Analysis = c(
    "Learning Gain (T1→T7)",
    "Retention Basic (T7→T8)",
    "Retention LLM (T7→T8)",
    "Retention Combined (T7→T8)"
  ),
  Model = c("Model 13", "Model 12a", "Model 12b", "Model 12c"),
  Items = c("2 basic", "2 basic", "8 LLM", "10 combined"),
  Beta = c(
    fixef(model13)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model12a)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model12b)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model12c)["Cocreation_Level"]
  ),
  SE = c(
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model13)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model12a)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model12b)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model12c)))["Cocreation_Level"]
  ),
  p_value = c(
    summary(model13)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model12a)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model12b)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model12c)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  ),
  R2_marginal = c(
    r2(model13)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model12a)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model12b)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model12c)$R2_marginal
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    CI_lower = c(
      confint(model13, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
      confint(model12a, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
      confint(model12b, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
      confint(model12c, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1]
    ),
    CI_upper = c(
      confint(model13, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
      confint(model12a, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
      confint(model12b, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
      confint(model12c, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2]
    ),
    `95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_lower, CI_upper),
    Significant = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

trajectory_summary %>%
  select(Analysis, Model, Items, Beta, SE, `95% CI`, p_value, Significant, R2_marginal) %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Learning Trajectory Models: Gains and Retention")

cat("\n\nKEY INSIGHTS FROM TRAJECTORY ANALYSIS:\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

# Analyze pattern of effects
if (trajectory_summary$Significant[1] == "Yes") {
  cat("1. LEARNING GAINS (T1→T7):\n")
  cat(sprintf("   Co-creation significantly predicts learning: beta = %.3f\n", trajectory_summary$Beta[1]))
  cat("   -> Higher co-creation = greater learning during intervention\n")
}

protective_count <- sum(trajectory_summary$Significant[2:4] == "Yes" & trajectory_summary$Beta[2:4] > 0)
if (protective_count > 0) {
  cat("\n2. PROTECTIVE EFFECTS (T7→T8):\n")
  cat(sprintf("   Co-creation protects against decay in %d/%d measures\n", protective_count, 3))
  cat("   -> Higher co-creation = better knowledge retention\n")
}

# Overall pattern interpretation
if (trajectory_summary$Significant[1] == "Yes" && protective_count > 0) {
  cat("\n3. DUAL BENEFIT:\n")
  cat("   -> Co-creation enhances BOTH initial learning AND retention\n")
  cat("   -> This represents comprehensive learning benefits\n")
} else if (trajectory_summary$Significant[1] == "Yes" && protective_count == 0) {
  cat("\n3. LEARNING WITHOUT RETENTION BENEFIT:\n")
  cat("   -> Co-creation enhances initial learning but not retention\n")
  cat("   -> Benefits may decay similarly across co-creation levels\n")
} else if (trajectory_summary$Significant[1] == "No" && protective_count > 0) {
  cat("\n3. RETENTION WITHOUT LEARNING BENEFIT:\n")
  cat("   -> Co-creation affects retention but not initial learning\n")
  cat("   -> May reflect consolidation/encoding differences\n")
}

cat("\n")
```

### Complete Learning Trajectory Visualization

```{r complete-trajectory, fig.width=14, fig.height=8}
# Create a comprehensive trajectory plot showing T1→T7→T8
# Merge all timepoint data for trajectory visualization

# Get T1 scores
df_t1_traj <- df_long %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T1") %>%
  select(`Participant ID`, Group_factor, Cocreation_Level, score_t1 = score)

# Get T7 scores  
df_t7_traj <- df_long %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T7") %>%
  select(`Participant ID`, score_t7 = score)

# Get T8 scores
df_t8_traj <- df_long %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "T8") %>%
  select(`Participant ID`, score_t8 = score)

# Merge all three
df_trajectory <- df_t1_traj %>%
  left_join(df_t7_traj, by = "Participant ID") %>%
  left_join(df_t8_traj, by = "Participant ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(score_t1, score_t7, score_t8),
               names_to = "Timepoint",
               values_to = "Score") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Score)) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint,
                      levels = c("score_t1", "score_t7", "score_t8"),
                      labels = c("T1\n(Baseline)", "T7\n(Post-test)", "T8\n(Follow-up)")),
    Cocreation_Factor = factor(Cocreation_Level,
                              labels = paste("Co-creation:", unique(sort(Cocreation_Level))))
  )

# Plot trajectories
ggplot(df_trajectory, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Score, group = `Participant ID`)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.2, color = "gray50") +
  stat_summary(aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "line", 
               size = 2, color = "#ef4444") +
  stat_summary(aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "point", 
               size = 4, color = "#dc2626", shape = 18) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cocreation_Factor, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Complete Learning Trajectories by Co-creation Level",
    subtitle = "Gray lines = individual students; Red = group mean",
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Basic Microcontroller Score (0-2)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

```{r trajectory-means-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
# Plot mean trajectories by co-creation level
df_trajectory_means <- df_trajectory %>%
  group_by(Cocreation_Level, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_score = sd(Score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

ggplot(df_trajectory_means, aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean_score, 
                                group = factor(Cocreation_Level),
                                color = factor(Cocreation_Level))) +
  geom_line(size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_score - se_score, ymax = mean_score + se_score),
                width = 0.1, size = 1) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name = "Co-creation\nLevel") +
  annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = -0.3, yend = -0.3,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), color = "#f59e0b", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = -0.45, label = "Learning", color = "#f59e0b", 
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("segment", x = 2, xend = 3, y = -0.3, yend = -0.3,
           arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), color = "#8b5cf6", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.5, y = -0.45, label = "Retention", color = "#8b5cf6", 
           fontface = "bold") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Learning Trajectories by Co-creation Level",
    subtitle = "Error bars = ±1 SE",
    x = "",
    y = "Basic Microcontroller Score (0-2)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.5, 2), clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 40, l = 10)
  )
```

## Comprehensive Comparison: All Co-creation Effects

```{r comprehensive-comparison, fig.width=18, fig.height=15}
# Create a 3x2 grid comparing all 6 key models
library(gridExtra)

# Basic T7 (Model 1)
p_basic_t7 <- plot_model(model1, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Basic Questions - T7 (Immediate)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model1)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model1))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-2)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# Basic T8 (Model 7)
p_basic_t8 <- plot_model(model7, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Basic Questions - T8 (Delayed)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model7)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model7))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-2)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# LLM T7 (Model 8)
p_llm_t7 <- plot_model(model8, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "LLM Questions - T7 (Immediate)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model8)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model8))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-8)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 8) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# LLM T8 (Model 9)
p_llm_t8 <- plot_model(model9, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "LLM Questions - T8 (Delayed)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model9)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model9))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-8)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 8) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# Combined T7 (Model 10)
p_combined_t7 <- plot_model(model10, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Combined Questions - T7 (Immediate)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model10)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model10))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-10)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# Combined T8 (Model 11)
p_combined_t8 <- plot_model(model11, type = "pred", terms = "Cocreation_Level") +
  labs(
    title = "Combined Questions - T8 (Delayed)",
    subtitle = paste0("beta = ", round(fixef(model11)[2], 3), 
                     ", p = ", format.pval(coef(summary(model11))[2, 5], digits = 3)),
    x = "Co-creation Level",
    y = "Predicted Score (0-10)"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

# Arrange in 3x2 grid
grid.arrange(p_basic_t7, p_basic_t8, 
             p_llm_t7, p_llm_t8,
             p_combined_t7, p_combined_t8,
             ncol = 2,
             top = "Comprehensive Comparison: Co-creation Effects on All Knowledge Outcomes")
```

### Effect Size Comparison Table

```{r effect-size-table}
# Create comprehensive effect size table
effect_comparison <- tibble(
  Question_Type = c("Basic (2 items)", "Basic (2 items)", 
                    "LLM (8 items)", "LLM (8 items)",
                    "Combined (10 items)", "Combined (10 items)"),
  Timepoint = c("T7 (Immediate)", "T8 (Delayed)", 
                "T7 (Immediate)", "T8 (Delayed)",
                "T7 (Immediate)", "T8 (Delayed)"),
  Model = c("Model 1", "Model 7", "Model 8", "Model 9", "Model 10", "Model 11"),
  Beta = c(
    fixef(model1)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model7)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model8)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model9)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model10)["Cocreation_Level"],
    fixef(model11)["Cocreation_Level"]
  ),
  SE = c(
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model1)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model7)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model8)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model9)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model10)))["Cocreation_Level"],
    sqrt(diag(vcov(model11)))["Cocreation_Level"]
  ),
  p_value = c(
    summary(model1)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model7)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model8)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model9)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model10)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    summary(model11)$coefficients["Cocreation_Level", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  ),
  CI_lower = c(
    confint(model1, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
    confint(model7, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
    confint(model8, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
    confint(model9, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
    confint(model10, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1],
    confint(model11, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[1]
  ),
  CI_upper = c(
    confint(model1, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
    confint(model7, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
    confint(model8, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
    confint(model9, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
    confint(model10, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2],
    confint(model11, parm = "Cocreation_Level")[2]
  ),
  R2_marginal = c(
    r2(model1)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model7)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model8)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model9)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model10)$R2_marginal,
    r2(model11)$R2_marginal
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    `95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_lower, CI_upper),
    Significant = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
    # Calculate standardized effect (per question)
    Beta_per_Q = c(Beta[1]/2, Beta[2]/2, Beta[3]/8, Beta[4]/8, Beta[5]/10, Beta[6]/10)
  )

effect_comparison %>%
  select(Question_Type, Timepoint, Model, Beta, SE, `95% CI`, p_value, Significant, 
         Beta_per_Q, R2_marginal) %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Comprehensive Comparison of Co-creation Effects")

cat("\n\nKEY INSIGHTS:\n")
cat("=" %>% strrep(60), "\n\n")

# Calculate retention rates
cat("EFFECT RETENTION (T8/T7 ratios):\n")
if (effect_comparison$Significant[1] == "Yes" && effect_comparison$Significant[2] == "Yes") {
  retention_basic <- (effect_comparison$Beta[2] / effect_comparison$Beta[1]) * 100
  cat(sprintf("  1. Basic questions: %.1f%% retention\n", retention_basic))
}

if (effect_comparison$Significant[3] == "Yes" && effect_comparison$Significant[4] == "Yes") {
  retention_llm <- (effect_comparison$Beta[4] / effect_comparison$Beta[3]) * 100
  cat(sprintf("  2. LLM questions: %.1f%% retention\n", retention_llm))
}

if (effect_comparison$Significant[5] == "Yes" && effect_comparison$Significant[6] == "Yes") {
  retention_combined <- (effect_comparison$Beta[6] / effect_comparison$Beta[5]) * 100
  cat(sprintf("  3. Combined questions: %.1f%% retention\n", retention_combined))
}

# Compare across question types at each timepoint
cat("\nPER-ITEM EFFECT SIZES:\n")
cat("T7 (Immediate):\n")
if (effect_comparison$Significant[1] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - Basic: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[1]))
}
if (effect_comparison$Significant[3] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - LLM: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[3]))
}
if (effect_comparison$Significant[5] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - Combined: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[5]))
}

cat("T8 (Delayed):\n")
if (effect_comparison$Significant[2] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - Basic: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[2]))
}
if (effect_comparison$Significant[4] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - LLM: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[4]))
}
if (effect_comparison$Significant[6] == "Yes") {
  cat(sprintf("  - Combined: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta_per_Q[6]))
}

# Check for additivity in combined model
if (effect_comparison$Significant[1] == "Yes" && effect_comparison$Significant[3] == "Yes" && 
    effect_comparison$Significant[5] == "Yes") {
  sum_t7 <- effect_comparison$Beta[1] + effect_comparison$Beta[3]
  cat(sprintf("\nADDITIVITY CHECK (T7):\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  Sum of components: %.3f (basic %.3f + LLM %.3f)\n", 
              sum_t7, effect_comparison$Beta[1], effect_comparison$Beta[3]))
  cat(sprintf("  Combined model: %.3f\n", effect_comparison$Beta[5]))
  cat(sprintf("  Difference: %.3f (%.1f%%)\n", 
              effect_comparison$Beta[5] - sum_t7,
              abs(effect_comparison$Beta[5] - sum_t7) / sum_t7 * 100))
  if (abs(effect_comparison$Beta[5] - sum_t7) < 0.15) {
    cat("  -> Effects are ADDITIVE (linear combination)\n")
  }
}
```
